name: depone/rector-example
description: Example: delete the require_once statements depone proves redundant, using a custom Rector rule.

scripts-descriptions.report: Run depone and save the JSON report the Rector rule consumes
scripts-descriptions.preview: Show the deletions Rector would make, without touching files
scripts-descriptions.fix: Delete every provably redundant require_once, then re-run depone to confirm the project is clean
